microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's global recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing communication workflows and accountability frameworks to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate—surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a structured corrective-action workflow adopted across engineering orgs.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, acting as primary program owner and stakeholder bridge for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, ensuring timeline, scope, and deliverable alignment.

Built and maintained supplier-analog partner datasets and engagement cadences, governing contact accuracy and responsiveness across external integrations to ensure **data integrity** and reliable program execution at scale.

Drove AI-powered automation of planning workflows, reducing cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21%—enabling the program to scale engagement volume without proportional headcount, mirroring supplier communication scale objectives.

Developed leadership-ready dashboards and performance metrics surfacing campaign health, gap analysis, and recovery trends across 45+ annual drills, enabling **data-driven decisions** for senior operations and engineering stakeholders.
microsoft_2023: Drove **supplier-analog adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, executing structured outreach campaigns and training sessions that activated 14 key engineering teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly through repeatable engagement frameworks.

Identified critical feature gaps by facilitating **11+ structured interviews** with Azure service teams, translating external stakeholder inputs into actionable roadmap recommendations that influenced intent-based YAML generation prioritization.

Improved **data integrity and retrieval** by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform, reducing lookup time by 83% and enabling scalable, accurate data access across program teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, driving stakeholder accountability across 140+ teams in a complex global operations environment.

Built a structured program to reduce manual operational toil during region launches—conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and developing a roadmap to automate critical communication and execution paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil and campaign performance gaps across 140+ teams, giving leadership actionable, data-driven insights to prioritize high-impact automation investments and supplier-analog support decisions.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, governing a prioritized backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and establish a repeatable, scalable intake process aligned to cross-functional program delivery standards.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and reducing manual handoff effort in a complex hardware manufacturing environment.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by designing and owning an end-to-end supplier-facing communication and scoping workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, standardizing outreach cadence and data collection through a structured CRM program.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, translating engagement analytics into actionable messaging improvements across digital channels.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and delivering executive-ready insights that informed corrective actions and supplier-analog cost decisions.
